stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
GEN 2 can be used to feed the DC BAT BUS: (NB: all contactors not mentioned are assumed to remain open)

options.a: via AC BUS 2 and DC BUS 1 when C1.4, C5.3 and C7.4 are closed.
options.b: via AC BUS 1 and DC BUS 2 when C1.4, C5.3 and C7.4 are closed.
options.c: via AC BUS 1 and DC BUS 1 when C1.4, C5.3 and C7.4 are closed.
options.d: via AC BUS 2 and DC BUS 2 when C1.4, C5.3 and C7.4 are closed.
